LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-01-2020 HEARING RE: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN P. N. AND J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC, PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134, ET SEQ., THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between P. N. And J.G. Wentworth Originations, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC.'s Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between P. N. And J.G. Wentworth Originations, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. is taken OFF CALENDAR. No appearance by moving party.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between P. N. And J.G. Wentworth Originations, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Continued To Jan-12-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KIM POMERANTZ, Esq. of Hoffman & Pomerantz, LLP (Tel: 310-371-2597) specially appearing on behalf of the attorney-of-record for Petitioner J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between P. N. And J.G. Wentworth Originations, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter discussed. The Court grants petitioner's request for a continuance. The matter is continued to January 12, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Petitioner to file an amended declaration/schedule in advance of the next hearing.

The Court requests an appearance by the transferor at the next hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
